entry.data:
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH IN THE EVENING

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 40
HIGHS AROUND 70

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
